<!-- autogenerated using templates/2-data/makefile-agents.md.repo.tpl -->
## `./Makefile`

### Docs:

`render-templates` render *.repo.tpl onto the repo (makefile.agents.md, repo-structure.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, README.md)

### CI:

`run-repo-ci-prepare-hooks` install lefthook git hooks
`run-repo-ci-precommit-all`: `run-repo-ci-prepare-hooks` run pre-commit hooks over all files (not just staged)

### Go:

`test` run all tests
`build` build the binary into ./dist via go build
`vet` go vet all packages
`install` install the binary into $GOPATH/bin

### Release:

`create-tag`
`release-check` validate both goreleaser configs
`release-darwin` build the darwin archives (native cc) into ./darwin-dist
`release-snapshot`: `release-darwin` local 4-target snapshot: darwin (native) + linux (zig), no publish
